text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One winter evening, after training...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have anything planned for
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! Well then, I will hang out with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And so, farewell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask for the details after that. Then comes the
next day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, well! You're quite early, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I figured you would also come early.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well obviously! I am a model student after all!
choice_data_list: Perhaps an hour before might be too early.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decided to meet at 11 a.m. It's 10 a.m. right
now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The early bird gets the worm! Let us depart at
once!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. I understand not being able to wait,
but there's no need to rush.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I have read up on the proper way to spend the
holidays just for today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That's what it said in the magazine
my classmate was reading!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And if there's a proper way, then the only thing
left to do is to test it for ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I have my concerns as to exactly what
was in the magazine her classmate was reading, I
decide to follow her without saying a word.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First up is lunch! There's a shop around here I
have my eye on...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ooh, there it is! The brick oven Italian restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The place really has that Italian vibe! It's great
that it's a hidden spot too, since there aren't
many people around.
choice_data_list: Maybe it's still too early for food?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll be fine! Let's have lunch at once!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Time to order!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ That sure was tasty!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That dessert we got off the hidden menu was
really sweet!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe the fact I'm class representative was no
secret to them, after all?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They served it on a heart-shaped plate...
meaning, the server trusted me to handle it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Next up is shopping! Um, do you have any shops
in mind?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Neither of us are really looking for anything, huh?
Let's just go to the places the magazine
suggested.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we do some window shopping around
a variety store that sells holiday ornaments. When
we're done, we also check out the light display at
night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All in all, we spend the whole day together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After having some dinner with her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What a day! We had so much fun! Don't you think
the itinerary for today was really up to snuff?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And now for the perfect end to round off a
perfect day! What did the magazine say to do
again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh yes! Let us embrace under the starry sky!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, embrace?! H-huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But that's what the magazine said! Am I missing
something?!
choice_data_list:
Are you sure the magazine wasn't talking about
what to do on a date?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on today, everything was pretty
date-like today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A date?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: All this time, I've been on a date with you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A date?! No way, no way, no waaay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To think, I, a class representative, would sully our
camaraderie!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I, Sakura Bakushin O, have ruined this day!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whatever shall I do? How can I show my face to
my classmates again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What if I am sentenced tomorrow to be paraded
about the academy grounds as a criminal?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What if I get deemed a bad class representative
as punishment for betraying their trust?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What now, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Looks like there weren't any students loitering
about!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, indeed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I ended up spending the holidays
with Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, there shouldn't be a thing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Since it's you and me, Trainer, I know there's
nothing impure about us.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I would call what we have the purest of
camaraderies!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, as class representative, hugging is out
of the question. But I have prepared a little
something as replacement!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Here! It's a pocket book!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's present is a planner that's
perfect for scheduling.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be useful, since the new year's
around the corner and all! See, I'm a pretty
attentive class rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Every race I plan to enter is already written down
there for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I flick through the diary, I see "G1, G1, G1",
over and over. It is crammed full of races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I think that's every race I've got my eye on, but
I've put your plans down as well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And canceling anything that's written down is a
super-duper no-go! Here's to another Bakushin
year with you!
choice_data_list: It would be my pleasure, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're welcome!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It's this late already?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: As class representative, I must not break curfew!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let us Bakushin, Trainer! This time, I'll pull you
along as a treat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Here, grab my hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, our fun but rowdy winter evening draws
to a close.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: LET'S BAKUSHIIIN!
